mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH (BATCH_ID, TEMPLATE_NAME, FROM_ADDR, TAGS, JOB_NAME, JOB_GROUP, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE_AT, TOTAL_COUNT, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#{batch_id}, #{template_name}, #{from_addr}, #{tags}, #{job_name}, #{job_group}, #{description}, #{start_date_at}, #{total_count}, #{tenant_id})

INSERT INTO ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH_ITEM (BATCH_ID, ITEM_INDEX, CORRELATION_ID, EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ, TO_ADDRS, CC_ADDRS, BCC_ADDRS, TEMPLATE_PARAMETERS) VALUES (#{batch_id}, #{item_index}, #{correlation_id}, #{email_send_dtl_seq}, #{to_addrs}, #{cc_addrs}, #{bcc_addrs}, #{template_parameters})

INSERT INTO ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH_ITEM (BATCH_ID, ITEM_INDEX, CORRELATION_ID, EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ, TO_ADDRS, CC_ADDRS, BCC_ADDRS, TEMPLATE_PARAMETERS) VALUES
(#{item.batch_id}, #{item.item_index}, #{item.correlation_id}, #{item.email_send_dtl_seq}, #{item.to_addrs}, #{item.cc_addrs}, #{item.bcc_addrs}, #{item.template_parameters})
mapper.select: SELECT BATCH_ID AS batch_id, TEMPLATE_NAME AS template_name, FROM_ADDR AS from_addr, TAGS AS tags, JOB_NAME AS job_name, JOB_GROUP AS job_group, DESCRIPTION AS description, START_DATE_AT AS start_date_at, STATUS AS status, TOTAL_COUNT AS total_count, TENANT_ID AS tenant_id FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH WHERE BATCH_ID = #{batch_id}

SELECT ITEM_ID AS item_id, BATCH_ID AS batch_id, ITEM_INDEX AS item_index, CORRELATION_ID AS correlation_id, EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ AS email_send_dtl_seq, TO_ADDRS AS to_addrs, CC_ADDRS AS cc_addrs, BCC_ADDRS AS bcc_addrs, TEMPLATE_PARAMETERS AS template_parameters FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH_ITEM WHERE BATCH_ID = #{batch_id} ORDER BY ITEM_INDEX
